member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDashboard
member.summary: Composite read model for one App's dashboard: the app, a per-environment card list (with live datasource health), and the promotion status (which envs are behind the baseline). Returned by IAppStudioService.GetDashboardAsync.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppEnvDashboard
member.summary: One environment's card in the dashboard pipeline.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.PromotionResult
member.summary: Outcome of promoting schema/config from one environment to another.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition
member.summary: A managed application — the top-level unit of the Studio. An App models a solution: it owns a set of s (Web, API, Data, Identity, …), a set of vironments, each owning its s. This is the App → Projects + App → Environment → Datasource hierarchy the Studio is built on.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition.SolutionPath
member.summary: Optional path to the .sln this app was registered from.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition.Projects
member.summary: The projects that compose this app/solution. The schema comes from the entries (their entity assemblies).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition.AssemblyPath
member.summary: Back-compat: the single entity assembly path, mirrored to the first data project for older callers. Prefer .

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition.DataProjects
member.summary: Projects flagged as data projects (the source of the app's entity schema).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition.Baseline
member.summary: The baseline environment (the source of truth schema others promote from). Defaults to the first env marked , else the first env.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppProject
member.summary: One project inside an app/solution (e.g. the Web, API, Data, or Identity project). Persistable and lighter than the discovery-time ProjectInfo; populated by "register from solution" (IAppStudioService.RegisterFromSolutionAsync).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppProject.Role
member.summary: Detected/assigned role (Data, Api, Web, IdentityServer, Service, …).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppProject.AssemblyPath
member.summary: Built assembly path (for data projects, the entity assembly).

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppEnv
member.summary: An environment inside an App (e.g. dev, staging, production). Carries its tier metadata (order, colour, approval policy) inline so the Studio can render a pipeline without a separate lookup. Tier templates still live in the Studio's EnvironmentProfile; an is a tier *instantiated* for one App.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppEnv.ProjectBindings
member.summary: Per-project bindings for THIS environment: where each project runs, which datasource it uses, and which code version is deployed here. This is the Project ↔ Environment relation — the missing link between code composition and environments.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppEnv.GetBinding(System.String)
member.summary: Binding for a project in this env, if any.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.ProjectEnvBinding
member.summary: How one project is realised in one environment: its endpoint, its datasource, and the code version deployed there. Drives code promotion (advance the version) and environment switching (change the endpoint) separately from schema migration.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.ProjectEnvBinding.EndpointUrl
member.summary: URL the project serves at in this env (Web/API/Identity). Null for non-hosted projects.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.ProjectEnvBinding.DatasourceName
member.summary: Name of the this project uses in this env (data projects).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.ProjectEnvBinding.DeployedVersion
member.summary: Code version/build deployed to this env (e.g. git sha or semver). Advanced by code promotion.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.ProjectEnvBinding.ConfigOverrides
member.summary: Free-form env-specific config overrides (feature flags, keys, …).

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDataSource
member.summary: A datasource bound to one App×Environment. links it to the owning project (a multi-project app may have several datasources per env — app DB, identity DB, logs DB — each owned by a different data project).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDataSource.ProjectName
member.summary: The project that owns this datasource in this env (usually a data project). When null, the datasource is app-wide.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.IAppRegistry.SaveApp(TheTechIdea.Beep.AppMap.AppDefinition)
member.summary: Full-app upsert: replace the stored app (matched by id or name) wholesale, preserving the original . This is the persistence primitive the Studio's IAppStudioService uses after mutating an app's environments / datasources.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum
member.summary: Comprehensive enumeration of authentication types for all connection types (databases, Web APIs, file systems, cloud services, etc.) Expanded from Web API-only to support all data source types

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.None
member.summary: No authentication required

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.ApiKey
member.summary: API Key authentication using custom header (default: X-API-Key) Requires ApiKey property to be set

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Basic
member.summary: Basic HTTP authentication using username and password Requires UserID and Password properties to be set

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Bearer
member.summary: Bearer token authentication Can use static token or OAuth2 flow depending on configuration

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.OAuth2
member.summary: OAuth2 authentication with automatic token management Supports client_credentials, password, and authorization_code grant types Requires TokenUrl, ClientId, and ClientSecret (or other credentials based on grant type)

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.UserPassword
member.summary: Username and password authentication (database standard) Requires UserID and Password properties

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Windows
member.summary: Windows Integrated Security (NTLM/Negotiate) Uses current Windows user credentials SQL Server: Set IntegratedSecurity=true or TrustedConnection=true

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Kerberos
member.summary: Kerberos authentication Requires KerberosServiceName, KerberosRealm, and optionally KerberosKdc Used for distributed authentication in enterprise environments

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Certificate
member.summary: Certificate-based authentication Requires CertificatePath or ClientCertificatePath Optional: ClientCertificatePassword for encrypted certificates

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.AzureActiveDirectory
member.summary: Azure Active Directory (AAD/Entra ID) authentication Requires TenantId, ApplicationId, and optionally ClientId/ClientSecret Used for Azure SQL, Cosmos DB, and other Azure services

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.LDAP
member.summary: LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authentication Requires UserID, Password, and Domain Used for directory services authentication

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.SAML
member.summary: SAML (Security Assertion Markup Language) authentication Requires AuthUrl and other SAML-specific parameters Used for single sign-on (SSO) scenarios

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.JWT
member.summary: JWT (JSON Web Token) authentication Requires a pre-obtained JWT token in ApiKey or KeyToken property

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Digest
member.summary: Digest authentication (RFC 2617) Requires UserID and Password properties More secure than Basic authentication

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Trusted
member.summary: Trusted connection (SQL Server specific) Uses Windows authentication without explicit credentials Same as Windows but specifically for SQL Server

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnum.Custom
member.summary: Custom authentication implementation Uses additional parameters from ParameterList Allows for provider-specific authentication mechanisms

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.AuthTypeEnumExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for AuthTypeEnum

member.summary: Checks if this authentication type requires OAuth configuration

member.summary: Checks if this authentication type is suitable for Web APIs

member.summary: Checks if this authentication type is suitable for databases

member.summary: Unique numeric identifier for the default value

member.summary: Unique GUID identifier for the default value

member.summary: Name of the property/field this default value applies to

member.summary: Static default value to use when propertyType is Static, ReplaceValue, or similar

member.summary: Rule or expression to use for dynamic value generation when propertyType is Rule, Expression, Function, etc.

member.summary: Type of default value processing to apply (Static, Rule, Expression, Function, etc.)

member.summary: Optional category for grouping related default values

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.Description
member.summary: Optional description explaining the purpose of this default value

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether this default value is currently enabled/active

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.CreatedDate
member.summary: When this default value configuration was created

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.ModifiedDate
member.summary: When this default value configuration was last modified

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.RuleSyntaxVersion
member.summary: Identifies the DSL syntax used for this rule. Stored as a string so the model project has no dependency on the engine. Typical values: "V1Legacy" (default, function-style like IF(...)) "V1Dot" (dot-segment style like IF.cond.trueVal.falseVal) Null or empty means the engine will auto-detect.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.RuleOptions
member.summary: Optional JSON or key=value string supplying per-rule execution hints. Examples: "timeout=5000;readonly=true" "fallback=ONEMPTY.static.0" Parsed by the resolver pipeline at runtime; ignored if null/empty.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.IsRuleBased
member.summary: Gets whether this default value uses a rule (dynamic) vs static value

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.IsAdvancedRuleType
member.summary: Checks if the property type is one of the advanced rule types

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.IsStatic
member.summary: Gets whether this default value is a simple static value

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.ConfigUtil.DefaultValue.IsValid
member.summary: Validates the default value configuration

member.summary: Gets a human-readable description of this default value configuration

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities
member.summary: Defines the capabilities and features supported by a specific datasource type. Used to determine what operations (transactions, joins, aggregations, etc.) are possible with a given datasource, enabling graceful degradation when features aren't available.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsTransactions
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports ACID transactions.
member.remarks: - RDBMS: true (full ACID) - MongoDB: true (multi-document, v4.0+) - Redis: true (Lua scripts provide atomicity) - Cassandra: false (eventual consistency only) - REST APIs: false (no server-side transaction support)

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsJoins
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports JOIN operations.
member.remarks: - RDBMS: true (full JOIN support) - MongoDB: false (uses $lookup aggregation, different paradigm) - NoSQL: false (typically requires denormalization) - Cassandra: false (no JOIN support)

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsAggregations
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports aggregation operations (GROUP BY, COUNT, SUM, etc.).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsIndexes
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports index creation and management.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsParameterization
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports parameterized queries (prevents SQL injection).
member.remarks: Note: Some drivers automatically handle parameterization (MongoDB, Elasticsearch), while others require explicit parameter binding (SQL databases).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsIdentity
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports auto-increment/identity columns.
member.remarks: - RDBMS: true (AUTO_INCREMENT, IDENTITY, SEQUENCE) - MongoDB: false (application-assigned _id or ObjectId) - Redis: true (INCR command) - File-based: false

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsTTL
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports Time-To-Live (TTL) on records.
member.remarks: - Redis: true (EXPIRE command) - MongoDB: true (TTL indexes) - Cassandra: true (TTL on columns) - RDBMS: false (no native TTL)

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsTemporalTables
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports temporal tables (time-versioning).
member.remarks: - SQL Server 2016+: true - PostgreSQL 10+: true - Most NoSQL: false

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsWindowFunctions
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports window functions (OVER, ROW_NUMBER, RANK, etc.).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsStoredProcedures
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports stored procedures or equivalent.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsBulkOperations
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports bulk insert/update/delete operations.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsFullTextSearch
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports full-text search.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsNativeJson
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource has native JSON support.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsPartitioning
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports table/collection partitioning.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsReplication
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports data replication.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsViews
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports views.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsSchemaEvolution
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports schema evolution (adding columns, etc.).
member.remarks: - RDBMS: true (ALTER TABLE, but can be slow) - MongoDB: true (schema-free) - Redis: false (key-value only)

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.IsSchemaEnforced
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource is schema-enforced (requires predefined structure).
member.remarks: - RDBMS: true - MongoDB: false (schema-free) - Redis: depends on usage

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsVectorSearch
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports vector similarity search.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsEmbeddings
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports embedding storage and retrieval.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsANN
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports Approximate Nearest Neighbor algorithms (HNSW, IVF).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsGraphTraversal
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports graph traversal operations.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsCypherQuery
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports Cypher query language (Neo4j).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsGremlinQuery
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports Gremlin query language.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsTimeSeriesQueries
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports time series specific queries.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsDownsampling
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports data downsampling/aggregation over time.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsRetentionPolicies
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports data retention policies.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsFacetedSearch
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports faceted/filtered search.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsHighlighting
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports search result highlighting.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsStreaming
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports streaming data operations.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsPublishSubscribe
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports publish/subscribe messaging pattern.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsMessageOrdering
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports message ordering guarantees.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsDeadLetterQueue
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports dead letter queue for failed messages.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsPushNotifications
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports push notifications / real-time updates.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsAppend
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports append-only operations (logs, streams).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsBinaryProtocol
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports binary protocol (gRPC, Thrift).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsAsyncOperations
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports async/await operation pattern.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsOAuth
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports OAuth authentication.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Core.DataSourceCapabilities.SupportsContinuousQueries
member.summary: Indicates whether the datasource supports continuous queries / change data capture.

member.summary: Gets or sets a description of key limitations or notable features.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB
member.summary:
Contract for data sources that can persist all data in-memory (no external DB roundtrip per op).
Implementers: SQLite (`:memory:`), DuckDB (in-memory mode), LiteDB (MemoryStream), RocksDB / LevelDB / LMDB (temp-dir fallback), Couchbase Lite (in-memory mode), Realm (in-memory Realm).
Lifecycle: OpenInMemory(name) → CreateStructure / LoadStructure → LoadData SyncData / RefreshData ↔ external sources FillFromDataSource / ExportToDataSource for bulk movement SaveStructure / LoadData for persistence round-trips ResetInMemory to clear data + schema without dropping the connection Dispose to release the in-memory engine

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.OpenInMemory(System.String)
member.summary: Opens (or re-opens) the in-memory engine with the given logical database name.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.GetInMemoryConnectionString
member.summary: Returns the in-memory connection string (e.g. SQLite ":memory:", LiteDB "memory").

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.ResetInMemory
member.summary: Drops all data + schema without closing the connection. Reuse for a fresh in-memory session.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.LoadStructureWithData(System.IProgress{TheTechIdea.Beep.Addin.PassedArgs},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Load structure AND hydrate rows from the backing store.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.FillFromDataSource(TheTechIdea.Beep.IDataSource,System.IProgress{TheTechIdea.Beep.Addin.PassedArgs},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk-copy all rows from into the in-memory engine.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.ExportToDataSource(TheTechIdea.Beep.IDataSource,System.IProgress{TheTechIdea.Beep.Addin.PassedArgs},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Bulk-copy all in-memory rows into .

member.name: E:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.StructureChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever the schema (InMemoryStructures) changes — created, dropped, or modified.

member.name: E:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.DataChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever row data changes — LoadData, SyncData, RefreshData, FillFrom, ExportTo.

member.name: E:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IInMemoryDB.StateChanged
member.summary: Raised whenever any state flag (IsCreated / IsLoaded / IsSaved / IsSynced) flips.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.RelationShipKeys.OnDeleteBehavior
member.summary: On-delete behavior for this relation. Valid values: "Cascade", "Restrict", "SetNull", "NoAction", "ClientCascade", "ClientNoAction", "ClientSetNull", or empty when not specified. Surfaced from EF Core's OnDelete() Fluent API and used to drive FK constraint generation when the migration manager applies relations.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.RelationShipKeys.OnUpdateBehavior
member.summary: On-update behavior for this relation. Same vocabulary as .

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView
member.summary:
Pure data model interface for a federated DataView definition. This interface describes WHAT the DataView IS — its identity, constituent entities, cross-source join definitions, and federation execution policy.
Implemented by: (POCO/serialisable model).
For the runtime DataView ENGINE (generating views, running queries, persisting), see , implemented by DataViewDataSource.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.ViewName
member.summary: Display name of this DataView.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.Viewtype
member.summary: The primary ViewType that governs how this view behaves.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description for UI display.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.EntityDataSourceID
member.summary: The primary single datasource ID (for single-source views).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.LocalEngineConnectionName
member.summary: The connection name of the local/in-memory engine used to evaluate federated queries.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.DataViewDataSourceID
member.summary: The connection name of the DataView's own datasource (file-based view metadata).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.CompositeLayerDataSourceID
member.summary: Legacy: composite layer reference.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.Entities
member.summary: The constituent entities (from one or more sources) that form this view.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.JoinDefinitions
member.summary: Defines how entities in this view are joined across data source boundaries. These are virtual join conditions — not physical FK constraints.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Determines whether data is cached (Cached) or always fetched live (DirectQuery).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.CacheTTLSeconds
member.summary: Duration in seconds the local materialized cache is valid. Ignored in DirectQuery mode.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.IDMDataView.CacheLastRefresh
member.summary: Timestamp of the last successful cache refresh. Used to evaluate TTL expiry.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView
member.summary:
Pure data model for a federated DataView definition. This class IS the data — it is serialised to/from JSON by the DataViewDataSource engine. It does NOT contain any engine logic (generating views, writing files, running queries).
For the engine behaviour, see DataViewDataSource which implements IDataViewOperations.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.Description
member.summary: Optional human-readable description for UI display.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.LocalEngineConnectionName
member.summary: The registered connection name of the local/in-memory engine (DuckDB, SQLite, etc.) used to evaluate federated queries. Null = auto-discover at runtime.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.JoinDefinitions
member.summary: Cross-source virtual join definitions. These are logical join conditions, not physical FKs. Populated automatically from FK discovery, or manually via the Relation Builder API.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.ExecutionMode
member.summary: Default to Cached for performance. Set to DirectQuery for always-live data.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.CacheTTLSeconds
member.summary: Duration in seconds the materialized cache is valid. Default: 5 minutes.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.DMDataView.CacheLastRefresh
member.summary: Timestamp of last successful cache refresh.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinType
member.summary: Defines the type of JOIN to apply between two federated entities.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition
member.summary: Describes a virtual join relationship between two entities in a federated DataView. Unlike EntityStructure.Relations (physical FK within one source), this describes cross-source logical join conditions that may be auto-discovered from FK metadata or manually defined via the Relation Builder API.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.GuidID
member.summary: Unique identifier for this join definition.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.LeftEntityName
member.summary: The logical name of the left entity as it appears in the DataView.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.LeftColumn
member.summary: The column of the left entity to join on.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.LeftDataSourceID
member.summary: The datasource connection name that owns the left entity.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.RightEntityName
member.summary: The logical name of the right entity as it appears in the DataView.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.RightColumn
member.summary: The column of the right entity to join on.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.RightDataSourceID
member.summary: The datasource connection name that owns the right entity.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.JoinType
member.summary: The type of SQL JOIN to apply.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.IsManuallyDefined
member.summary: True if this join was defined manually via the Relation Builder API. False if auto-discovered from FK metadata (GetChildTablesList).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.AdditionalCondition
member.summary: Optional additional filter condition appended to the JOIN ON clause. E.g. "ORDERS.YEAR = 2024" → ON L.col = R.col AND (ORDERS.YEAR = 2024)

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederatedJoinDefinition.Description
member.summary: Optional description/label for UI display.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederationExecutionMode
member.summary: Defines how a federated DataView resolves its data at query time.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederationExecutionMode.Cached
member.summary: Data is materialized into a local/in-memory engine and cached for CacheTTLSeconds. Best for read-heavy analytical workloads.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.FederationExecutionMode.DirectQuery
member.summary: Data is always fetched live from source databases on every query. Best for real-time or low-volume data where staleness is unacceptable.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.RestrictionValue
member.summary: Represents a filter restriction for DataView queries.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.RestrictionValue.Fieldname
member.summary: The name of the field to filter on.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.RestrictionValue.value
member.summary: The value to compare against.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary
member.summary: Lightweight snapshot of a DataView's current health and structure. Returned by .

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.EntityCount
member.summary: Total number of entities in the view.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.JoinCount
member.summary: Total join definitions (manual + auto-discovered).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.ManualJoinCount
member.summary: Joins that were created manually via the Relation Builder.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.DataSourceCount
member.summary: Number of distinct DataSource IDs referenced by entities.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.IsValid
member.summary: True if ValidateView() returned no errors.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.Warnings
member.summary: Validation warnings or errors (empty when IsValid=true).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.UnconnectedEntities
member.summary: Entities not connected to any join (potential orphans).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.BrokenEntities
member.summary: Entities whose datasource is currently unavailable.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.CacheLastRefresh
member.summary: Last time the local cache was successfully materialised.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.CacheTTLSeconds
member.summary: Configured cache TTL in seconds.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.DataView.ViewSummary.IsCacheExpired
member.summary: Whether the cache has expired and needs re-materialisation.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence
member.summary: Immutable audit record capturing the evidence for a single resolved (or quarantined) bidirectional sync conflict. Collected in BeepSyncManager.LastRunConflicts when is true.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.EntityName
member.summary: Entity (table) name where the conflict occurred.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.RecordKey
member.summary: Primary-key string representation of the conflicting record.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.SourceValues
member.summary: Source-side values at the time of conflict detection.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.DestinationValues
member.summary: Destination-side values at the time of conflict detection.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.Winner
member.summary: Winner chosen by the resolution rule. Values: "source", "destination", "quarantine".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.ReasonCode
member.summary: Reason code returned by the rule. Examples: "LATEST-WINS", "CUSTOM", "UNRESOLVABLE", "FALLBACK".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.RuleKey
member.summary: Rule Engine key that produced this decision.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.RuleElapsed
member.summary: Wall-clock time the rule engine spent evaluating this conflict.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.DetectedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this conflict was detected.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictEvidence.SchemaId
member.summary: Schema Id this conflict belongs to.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy
member.summary: Defines how bidirectional sync conflicts are detected and resolved for a . When absent, the schema's string is used as a fallback.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.ResolutionRuleKey
member.summary: Rule Engine key that produces the winner for a given record conflict. Built-in keys: "sync.conflict.source-wins", "sync.conflict.destination-wins", "sync.conflict.latest-timestamp-wins", "sync.conflict.fail-on-conflict".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.QuarantineDsName
member.summary: Data source name where unresolvable records are quarantined.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.QuarantineEntity
member.summary: Entity / table in that receives quarantined rows.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.CaptureEvidence
member.summary: When true (default), each resolved conflict produces a entry in BeepSyncManager.LastRunConflicts.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.MaxConflictsPerRun
member.summary: Maximum number of conflicts allowed per sync run before the is applied. -1 = unlimited.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ConflictPolicy.OnMaxExceededAction
member.summary: Action taken when is exceeded. Values: "Abort", "Continue", "QuarantineRest".

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult
member.summary: The result of evaluating a single Data Quality gate rule against a record or field. Captured in for every record that is routed to the reject channel during a sync run.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.RuleKey
member.summary: The rule-engine key that was evaluated, e.g. sync.dq.required-fields.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.Passed
member.summary: true when the DQ check passed; false when the record was rejected.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.ReasonCode
member.summary: Short machine-readable code returned from the rule, e.g. DQ-FAIL, NULL-REQUIRED, TYPE-MISMATCH.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.FieldName
member.summary: Optional field name that caused the failure (when available from the rule outputs).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.Message
member.summary: Human-readable message describing why the DQ check failed.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.EntityName
member.summary: The name of the entity that was being validated.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqGateResult.EvaluatedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this DQ result was captured.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy
member.summary: Policy that controls which Data Quality gate rules are evaluated on each batch before records are written to the destination. Stored on .

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.Enabled
member.summary: When false the entire DQ gate is skipped (default: true).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.RuleKeys
member.summary: Ordered list of Rule Engine keys to evaluate per record, e.g. sync.dq.required-fields, sync.dq.type-validity. Rules are applied in order; the first failure routes the record to the reject channel.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.BatchThresholdRuleKey
member.summary: Rule key evaluated at the end of each batch to decide whether the run should be aborted due to a high reject rate. Defaults to sync.dq.batch-threshold.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.MaxRejectRatePercent
member.summary: Maximum percentage of records that may be rejected before the batch-threshold rule triggers an AbortRun action (0–100; 0 = unlimited). Only used as a fallback when the rule engine is unavailable.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.RejectChannelDataSourceName
member.summary: Optional name of the reject-channel data source. Rejected records are written here when set.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.RejectChannelEntityName
member.summary: Optional entity (table) name in the reject-channel data source.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.DqPolicy.FillDefaultsBeforeEval
member.summary: When true, the is invoked to fill missing destination fields before DQ rules are evaluated. Requires to also be set.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.ProjectDataSourceBinding.EnvironmentId

member.summary: When this binding was last modified.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Retry and error-classification policy attached to a . Drives Rule-Engine-based error triage and exponential backoff across batch retries.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.MaxAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts for a transient error before aborting. Default 3.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.BaseDelayMs
member.summary: Base delay in milliseconds between retry attempts. Combined with to compute per-attempt delay.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.BackoffMode
member.summary: Backoff strategy applied to between retries. Values: "Linear", "Exponential", "Fixed".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.ErrorCategoryRuleKey
member.summary: Rule Engine key that classifies an import error into a category/action pair. Expected outputs: "category" = "Transient" | "Validation" | "Conflict" | "Fatal" "action" = "Retry" | "Abort" | "Quarantine" | "Escalate"

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.NonRetryableCategories
member.summary: Error categories that must never be retried, regardless of . Defaults to ["Fatal"].

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.MaxResumeWindowHours
member.summary: Maximum age (in hours) of a saved checkpoint before it is considered stale and unsafe to resume. Used by the sync.checkpoint.resume-safe rule.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.RetryPolicy.CheckpointEnabled
member.summary: When true, a checkpoint is saved after each successfully committed batch, enabling mid-run resume on transient failures.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject
member.summary: A Data project that is shared by multiple consumer projects.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject.DataProject
member.summary: The Data project itself.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject.EntityNames
member.summary: Entities discovered in the Data project.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject.ConsumerProjects
member.summary: Projects that reference (consume) this Data project.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject.EntityCount
member.summary: Number of entities.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SharedDataProject.ConsumerCount
member.summary: Number of consumers.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile
member.summary: Service Level Objective profile that defines thresholds governing when a sync run is considered compliant. Stored on .

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.ProfileName
member.summary: Display name that identifies the SLO tier, e.g. Critical, Standard, or NonCritical.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.MinSuccessRate
member.summary: Minimum acceptable success rate (0.0–1.0). E.g. 0.99 means 99 %. Default: 0.95.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.MaxDurationMs
member.summary: Maximum allowed run duration in milliseconds. Default: 300_000 (5 minutes).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.MaxFreshnessLagSeconds
member.summary: Maximum allowed data-freshness lag in seconds. Default: 3600 (1 hour).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.MaxConflictRate
member.summary: Maximum acceptable conflict rate (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.05 (5 %).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.MaxRejectRate
member.summary: Maximum acceptable reject rate (0.0–1.0). Default: 0.05 (5 %).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SloProfile.AlertRuleKeys
member.summary: Ordered list of alert rule keys evaluated against at the end of each run. E.g. sync.alert.low-success-rate.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord
member.summary: An alert artifact emitted by when an SLO alert rule fires during or after a sync run. Each record maps to exactly one fired alert rule.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.AlertId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this alert instance.

member.summary: Schema identifier this alert belongs to.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.RunId
member.summary: Run identifier during which the alert was emitted.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.CorrelationId
member.summary: Correlation identifier for tracing — includes mapping plan version when available. Format: {SchemaId}.{RunId}.{MappingPlanVersion}.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.RuleKey
member.summary: The alert rule key that triggered this record, e.g. sync.alert.low-success-rate.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.Severity
member.summary: Severity tier: Critical, Warning, or Info.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.Reason
member.summary: Human-readable reason describing why the alert fired.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.RemediationHint
member.summary: Suggested action operators should take to resolve the alert.

member.summary: UTC timestamp when the alert was emitted (stamped by DefaultsManager when available).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.EmittedBy
member.summary: Name of the user/process that emitted the alert.

member.summary: Lifecycle status: Open, Acknowledged, or Resolved.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncAlertRecord.AdditionalContext
member.summary: Additional diagnostic context values (e.g., measured metric vs SLO threshold, mapping drift notice, etc.).

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint
member.summary: Checkpoint artifact persisted after each successful batch during a sync run. Enables partial-resume and idempotent replay without re-processing records already written.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.RunId
member.summary: Unique run identifier for this sync execution.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.SchemaId
member.summary: Schema Id this checkpoint belongs to.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.ProcessedOffset
member.summary: Number of records successfully processed at the time this checkpoint was saved.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.TotalExpected
member.summary: Total number of records expected in this run (0 = unknown).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.ProgressPercent
member.summary: Completion percentage derived from offset / total. 0 when total is unknown.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.SavedAt
member.summary: UTC timestamp when this checkpoint was saved.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.SavedBy
member.summary: User or service that saved this checkpoint.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.Status
member.summary: Lifecycle state of this checkpoint. Values: "InProgress", "Completed", "Failed", "Stale".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.AttemptCount
member.summary: Total number of run attempts (including current).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.LastErrorCategory
member.summary: Error category from the last failure, as classified by the retry rule engine.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.CompiledMappingPlanId
member.summary: Compiled mapping plan identifier cached at run start for consistent field-level behaviour across retried batches.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.MappingVersion
member.summary: Governance version of the mapping plan at checkpoint time, for drift detection on resume.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncCheckpoint.LastProcessedKeyValue
member.summary: Primary-key value of the last successfully written record in this run. Used as the idempotency anchor when resuming from a partial batch.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile
member.summary: Performance and scale knobs for a sync run. Controls batch sizes, parallelism, rule policy mode, and caching TTLs.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.BatchSize
member.summary: Target number of records per import batch. Default: 1000.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.MaxParallelism
member.summary: Maximum degree of parallelism when is used, or when parallel batch execution is enabled. Default: 4.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.RulePolicyMode
member.summary:
Rule policy mode used for all rule evaluations during this run.
"Safe" — full depth + lifecycle enforcement (default)
"FastPath" — reduced depth, no lifecycle enforcement

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.DefaultsCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: How long (seconds) a cached EntityDefaultsProfile is considered fresh. Default: 300 (5 minutes).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.WarmUpDefaultsProfileOnRun
member.summary: When true, BeepSyncManager pre-loads and caches the EntityDefaultsProfile for the destination entity before the retry loop starts. Default: true.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.SkipRulesOnCleanBatch
member.summary: When true, DQ rule evaluation is skipped for a record batch that had zero failures in the preceding batch. Use with caution on non-critical paths only. Default: false.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.UseParallelBatches
member.summary: When true, runs eligible schemas concurrently up to tasks. Default: true.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPerformanceProfile.ParallelBatchQueueDepth
member.summary: Depth of the parallel batch queue before back-pressure is applied. Default: 8.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncRulePolicy
member.summary: Controls how the Rule Engine is applied during a sync run. All properties are opt-in; null / false = feature inactive.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncRulePolicy.Enabled
member.summary: When false the Rule Engine is never invoked for this schema.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncRulePolicy.CatalogVersion
member.summary: Catalog version tag expected to be present in the registered RuleCatalog. Used by CI lint to detect version drift.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncRulePolicy.MaxDepth
member.summary: Maximum rule evaluation depth. Maps directly to RuleExecutionPolicy.MaxDepth. 0 = use engine default.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncRulePolicy.MaxExecutionMs
member.summary: Maximum wall-clock time in ms before a rule evaluation is aborted. 0 = no timeout.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncDefaultsPolicy
member.summary: Controls how DefaultsManager is applied before destination writes.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncDefaultsPolicy.Enabled
member.summary: When false DefaultsManager is never invoked for this schema.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncDefaultsPolicy.ApplyOnInsert
member.summary: When true, DefaultsManager.Apply is called before every destination INSERT.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncDefaultsPolicy.ApplyOnUpdate
member.summary: When true, DefaultsManager.Apply is called before every destination UPDATE (typically to refresh audit-trail fields such as UpdatedAt / UpdatedBy).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncDefaultsPolicy.ProfileKey
member.summary: Optional override key for the EntityDefaultsProfile. When null the (datasourceName, entityName) pair is used as the lookup key.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy
member.summary: Controls how MappingManager is consulted during a sync run.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy.Enabled
member.summary: When false MappingManager integrations are skipped.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy.MinQualityScore
member.summary: Minimum mapping quality score (0–100) required before a sync plan is approved. Scores below this threshold produce an Error-severity preflight issue.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy.RequiredApprovalState
member.summary: Approval state that must be recorded on the compiled mapping plan before the schema is considered eligible for production rollout. Serialised as string so models project has no dependency on MappingApprovalState enum. Expected values: "Draft" | "ReviewedAndApproved" | "Approved"

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy.OnDriftAction
member.summary: Action taken when drift is detected between the stored mapping plan and the live entity structures. Expected values: "Warn" | "Block" | "AutoRemapAndReview"

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncMappingPolicy.CacheCompiledPlan
member.summary: When true, the compiled mapping plan is cached on the synchronisation context for the lifetime of the run and reused across all parallel batch tasks.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport
member.summary: Result of a sync preflight check run before executing any data movement. Returned by BeepSyncManager.RunPreflightAsync.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport.PlanId
member.summary: Schema ID that was checked.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport.IsApproved
member.summary: True when no Error-severity issues were found across all integration channels.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport.MappingScore
member.summary: Mapping quality score returned by MappingManager (0–100). -1 when not evaluated.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport.MappingState
member.summary: Current mapping approval state string as returned by MappingManager.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.SyncPreflightReport.RulesPassed
member.summary: True when all rule-engine preflight checks passed (or rule engine is disabled).

member.summary: True when a defaults profile was found for the destination entity.

member.summary: UTC timestamp at which the preflight ran.

member.summary: All issues collected across Schema, Rules, Defaults, and Mapping channels.

member.summary: Integration channel that raised the issue: "Schema" | "Rules" | "Defaults" | "Mapping".

member.summary: Human severity level: "Error" | "Warning" | "Info".

member.summary: Unique identifier for this specific version artifact.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy
member.summary: Defines the incremental-sync (watermark / CDC) behaviour for a . When present, the orchestrator uses watermark-based filtering rather than full table loads.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.WatermarkMode
member.summary: Watermark tracking strategy. Supported values: "Timestamp", "Sequence", "CompositeKey".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.WatermarkField
member.summary: Source field whose value advances per sync run (e.g. "UpdatedAt", "RowVersion").

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.LastWatermarkValue
member.summary: The last committed watermark value from the previous successful run.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.OverlapWindowSeconds
member.summary: How many seconds to overlap back from when building the lower-bound filter, to catch records that arrived late in the previous window. Default 300 (5 minutes).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.DedupeStrategy
member.summary: De-duplication strategy when the overlap window produces duplicate rows. Supported values: "LastWrite", "SourcePrimary", "None".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.FilterRuleKey
member.summary: Optional Rule Engine key that builds an list from the current watermark state. When null the orchestrator builds a simple range filter.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.LateArrivalRuleKey
member.summary: Rule Engine key invoked to classify late-arriving records after the window closes. Expected output key "action" = "include" | "quarantine" | "reject".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.TombstoneRuleKey
member.summary: Rule Engine key invoked for CDC tombstone / delete records. Expected output key "action" = "soft-delete" | "hard-delete" | "mark-inactive".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.BeepSync.WatermarkPolicy.ReplayEnabled
member.summary: When true (default), re-running the same window is idempotent: the orchestrator applies to avoid inserting duplicate rows.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.RulePolicy
member.summary: Optional Rule Engine wiring for this schema. Null = Rule Engine disabled.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.DefaultsPolicy
member.summary: Optional DefaultsManager wiring for this schema. Null = Defaults disabled.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.MappingPolicy
member.summary: Optional MappingManager wiring for this schema. Null = Mapping integration disabled.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.CurrentSchemaVersion
member.summary: Most recent version artifact stamped when this schema was last saved or promoted.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.WatermarkPolicy
member.summary: Optional incremental-sync policy. When set, the orchestrator uses watermark-based filtering instead of a full table load. Null = full load (default).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.ConflictPolicy
member.summary: Optional conflict-resolution policy for bidirectional syncs. When null the legacy string drives behaviour.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.RetryPolicy
member.summary: Optional retry/backoff policy for transient failures. When null the sync will not be retried on failure.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.ActiveCheckpoint
member.summary: The most recently saved checkpoint for this schema. Populated during a run when is true.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.DqPolicy
member.summary: Optional Data Quality gate policy. When set, each record passes through RuleEngine DQ checks before being written to the destination. Failures are routed to the reject channel.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.LastReconciliationReport
member.summary: The reconciliation report produced by the most recent sync run. Null when no run has completed yet.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.SloProfile
member.summary: SLO thresholds and alert rule keys for this schema. When set, SLO metrics and alert trigger rules are evaluated at the end of every run.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.LastRunAlerts
member.summary: Alert records emitted during the most recent sync run. Reset at the start of each run.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.DataSyncSchema.PerfProfile
member.summary: Performance and scale knobs for this schema's sync runs. Controls batch size, parallelism degree, rule policy mode, and cache TTLs.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Defaults.Attributes.DefaultResolverAttribute
member.summary: Decorate any IDefaultValueResolver implementation with this attribute so that DefaultResolverRegistry can auto-discover and register it at startup via AssemblyHandler — the same pattern as [AddinAttribute] connectors, [PipelinePluginAttribute] pipeline plugins, and [FileReaderAttribute] file-format readers.

member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in tooling UI, e.g. "Tenant Context Resolver".

member.summary: Optional description of what this resolver does.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Defaults.Attributes.DefaultResolverAttribute.Author
member.summary: Author or team name.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Defaults.Attributes.DefaultResolverAttribute.Version
member.summary: Semantic version string, e.g. "1.0.0".

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Defaults.Attributes.DefaultResolverAttribute.IconPath
member.summary: Optional path to an icon (used by designer tooling).

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Defaults.Attributes.DefaultResolverAttribute.SupportedTokens
member.summary: Comma-separated list of rule tokens this resolver handles, e.g. "TENANT,TENANTID,ORGID". Used by tooling for documentation and auto-complete — not enforced at runtime.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.DataBlockRelationship
member.summary: Extended data block relationship with additional metadata.
member.remarks: B36/D6 (audit pass 3, 2026-06): the previous version carried a number of fields that were never read by the master/detail engine (CascadeDelete, CascadeUpdate, Strength, CustomSyncLogic, Metrics, ExtendedProperties). The cascade / strength / custom-sync fields were placeholders for a feature that was never built; the metrics were never updated anywhere. The supporting RelationshipStrength enum and RelationshipMetrics class are also removed. External hosts that depended on the removed fields must migrate — the engine does not read them, so removing the fields has no runtime behavior change beyond compile-time breakage.

member.summary: Event arguments for DML (Data Manipulation Language) triggers. Carry block name, operation, current record, and cancellation state. Field-value accessors are convenience wrappers for trigger handlers. Prefer FormsManager.SetFieldValue / FormsManager.GetFieldValue or TriggerContext.FormsManager for new code — the context gives the trigger handler full engine access including validation and LOVs.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus
member.summary: Mirrors Oracle Forms :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS. Distinct from which only describes the overall block mode (Normal / Enter-Query / Query).

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus.Query
member.summary: Default state of a fetched record that has not been changed. Maps to :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS = 'QUERY'.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus.New
member.summary: Brand new record that has been created with CREATE_RECORD and not yet committed. Maps to :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS = 'NEW'.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus.Insert
member.summary: New record that was successfully inserted into the database. Maps to :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS = 'INSERT'. Beep stores this state so trigger handlers can distinguish "uncommitted new" from "newly inserted" the way Oracle Forms does.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus.Changed
member.summary: Fetched record that has at least one field updated and not yet committed. Maps to :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS = 'CHANGED'.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus.QueryCriteria
member.summary: Record in the query criteria area. Maps to :SYSTEM.RECORD_STATUS = 'QUERY' when the block is in .

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatusExtensions
member.summary: Helpers to translate between the various status enums the editor exposes and the string form Oracle Forms queries use.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatusExtensions.IsUnsaved(TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.BeepRecordStatus)
member.summary: Returns true when the record has unsaved changes (NEW, INSERT, or CHANGED) the way Oracle Forms would surface "the block has changes".

member.summary: Returns true when the record was created by a CREATE_RECORD call (NEW or INSERT) and therefore should be reported as a new row by visual indicators (asterisk in the row header, etc.).

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.SystemVariables
member.summary: Plain-data container that mirrors the Oracle Forms :SYSTEM variables. Held by and the wider BeepForms runtime. Two instances are typical per host: a form-level singleton and one per registered block.
member.remarks: The class uses UPPER_SNAKE_CASE public fields rather than C#-style properties to match the Oracle Forms naming convention that trigger authors expect when reading :SYSTEM.CURSOR_RECORD etc. All fields are public so reflection-style access from generated trigger code remains straightforward.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.SystemVariables.Reset
member.summary: Reset the variables back to their initial form. Used by SystemVariablesManager.Reset() when a new form is opened or the host shuts down.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.UOWManager.Models.SystemVariables.ToSnapshot
member.summary: Returns the snapshot of every supported variable as a -keyed dictionary. Useful when passing state to trigger handlers on background threads or to logging surfaces.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerDefinition.Execute(TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerContext)
member.summary: Execute the trigger synchronously.
member.remarks:
B1 (audit pass 4, 2026-06): the AsyncHandler-only path (Handler is null && AsyncHandler is not null) calls .GetAwaiter().GetResult() on the async handler. This is the classic sync-over-async pattern and DEADLOCKS on a UI thread with a captured : the awaited task tries to resume on the captured context, but the context is blocked waiting for the task to complete. Callers that may be on a UI thread (Forms, WPF, Blazor) MUST use
instead. The TriggerManager's sync FireXxxTrigger overloads are safe to call from any thread because they reach this method from the engine's worker thread (or a thread without a captured sync context), but external callers that invoke Execute directly from a UI event handler WILL deadlock.
The detection in the AsyncHandler-only branch is a defensive belt-and-braces: if we are on a captured sync context, refuse the call and throw with a clear message. This catches the common case (UI thread) early. Callers without a sync context (thread pool, console, test runners) will not see the throw and will get the same .GetAwaiter().GetResult() behavior as before.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerDefinition.ExecuteAsync(TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the trigger asynchronously

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerDefinition.ResetStatistics
member.summary: Reset execution statistics

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.Forms.Models.TriggerDefinition.Clone
member.summary: Clone this trigger definition.
member.remarks: B2 (audit pass 4, 2026-06): the previous version did not copy (a ) or . A clone of a trigger that had DependsOn = ["x"] and ChainMode = Continue came out with an empty dependency list and the default StopOnFailure chain mode — silently broken. The dependencies are now deep-copied (new list) and the chain mode is copied. The new TriggerId still differs from the source (by design — clones are independent registrations).

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper
member.summary:
Defines the contract for all datasource-specific helper implementations. Each datasource type (RDBMS, MongoDB, Redis, etc.) should have an implementation of this interface to provide database-agnostic operations.
This abstraction enables: - Unified API for different datasource types - Query generation for each datasource's native language/syntax - Feature detection for graceful degradation - Type mapping across different database systems

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.SupportedType
member.summary: Gets or sets the datasource type this helper is designed for. Setting this allows dynamic switching between different datasource types at runtime.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.Name
member.summary: Gets the human-readable name of the datasource type.

member.name: P:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.Capabilities
member.summary: Gets the capabilities of this datasource type.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetSchemaQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a query to retrieve schemas or databases accessible to the specified user.
member.param: The username to check privileges for (can be null for some datasources)

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetTableExistsQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a query to check if a table/collection exists.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetColumnInfoQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a query to retrieve column/field information for a table/collection.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateCreateTableSql(TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.EntityStructure,System.String,System.Nullable{TheTechIdea.Beep.Utilities.DataSourceType})
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to create a table/collection from an entity structure. Supports optional schema name and datasource type for multi-dialect generation.
member.param: Optional schema name (for SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle). Default uses default schema.
Optional datasource type for context-aware generation. If null, uses SupportedType.
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateDropTableSql(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to drop a table/collection.
member.param: The name of the table/collection to drop
Optional schema name for multi-schema datasources
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateTruncateTableSql(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to truncate a table/collection (remove all data).
member.param: Optional schema name for multi-schema datasources
member.returns: DML statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateCreateIndexSql(System.String,System.String,System.String[],System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to create an index on specified columns.
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateAddColumnSql(System.String,TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.EntityField)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to add a column to an existing table/collection. Unsupported by schema-free datasources.
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateAlterColumnSql(System.String,System.String,TheTechIdea.Beep.DataBase.EntityField)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to modify an existing column definition. Unsupported by schema-free datasources and has limited support in some RDBMS.
member.param: Name of the column to modify
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateDropColumnSql(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to drop a column from a table/collection. Unsupported by schema-free datasources.
member.param: Name of the column to drop
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateRenameTableSql(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to rename a table/collection.
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateRenameColumnSql(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to rename a column in a table/collection.
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateAddPrimaryKeySql(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to add a primary key constraint to a table. Unsupported by most NoSQL datasources except Cassandra.
member.param: Columns that form the primary key
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateAddForeignKeySql(System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to add a foreign key constraint between two tables. Unsupported by NoSQL datasources (MongoDB, Redis, etc.).
member.param: The table containing the foreign key
Columns that form the foreign key
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateAddConstraintSql(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL/query to add a generic constraint (UNIQUE, CHECK, etc.).
member.returns: DDL statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.summary: Generates a query to retrieve primary key information for a table.

member.summary: Generates a query to retrieve foreign key information for a table.
member.returns: Query statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetConstraintsQuery(System.String)
member.summary: Generates a query to retrieve all constraints (PRIMARY, FOREIGN, UNIQUE, CHECK) for a table.
member.returns: Query statement, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateBeginTransactionSql
member.summary: Generates SQL/command to begin a transaction. Unsupported by datasources without ACID (MongoDB pre-v4.0, Redis with limited scope, etc.).
member.returns: SQL command, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GenerateCommitSql
member.summary: Generates SQL/command to commit a transaction. Unsupported by datasources without ACID support.
member.returns: SQL command, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.summary: Generates SQL/command to rollback a transaction. Unsupported by datasources without ACID support.
member.returns: SQL command, success indicator, and error message if failed

member.summary: Generates SQL/query to select records with optional filtering and paging.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.QuoteIdentifier(System.String)
member.summary: Safely quotes/escapes identifiers (table names, column names) according to datasource rules.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.MapClrTypeToDatasourceType(System.Type,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Maps a C# type to the datasource's native type with optional size/precision constraints.
member.param: Optional size constraint for string types (e.g., 255 for VARCHAR)
Optional precision for numeric types (e.g., 18 for DECIMAL)
Optional scale for numeric types (e.g., 2 for DECIMAL)

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.MapDatasourceTypeToClrType(System.String)
member.summary: Maps a datasource type to the corresponding C# type.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.SupportsCapability(TheTechIdea.Beep.Utilities.CapabilityType)
member.summary: Checks whether this datasource supports a specific operation capability. Used for graceful degradation when features aren't available.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetMaxStringSize
member.summary: Gets the maximum size allowed for string/varchar columns in this datasource. Returns -1 for unlimited, 0 for unsupported.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDataSourceHelper.GetMaxNumericPrecision
member.summary: Gets the maximum numeric precision supported by this datasource. For DECIMAL/NUMERIC types, returns total digits. Returns 0 for unlimited.

member.name: T:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.KeyDetectionStrategy
member.summary: Strategy for detecting the primary key in POCO-to-Entity conversion.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.KeyDetectionStrategy.AttributeOnly
member.summary: Only uses [Key] DataAnnotation attribute. Fails if no [Key] found.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.KeyDetectionStrategy.ConventionOnly
member.summary: Only uses naming conventions: "Id" or "{ClassName}Id". Fails if no match found.

member.name: F:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.KeyDetectionStrategy.AttributeThenConvention
member.summary: Tries [Key] attribute first, then falls back to naming conventions. Default recommended strategy.

member.name: M:TheTechIdea.Beep.Editor.IDMEEditor.GetDataSourceHelper(TheTechIdea.Beep.Utilities.DataSourceType)
